reviews.review_description: its like a mixture of animal companys mining with scary baboon's horror and i love it i like the idea of the further you go the more valuable the ores get but i like the twist of a monster chasing you so you have more challenge and ecxitment 10/10 recommended can wait to se the game in the future i can tell its gonna get big
I haven’t played because I CANT JOIN A LOBBY WITH SOMEONE IN IT TO TALK TO!!!!
